Cindy Hyde-Smith is being bankrolled by a major Hillary Clinton donor. Sean Parker -- a California billionaire who hosted a fundraiser for Clinton at his own home and raised over $1 million to try and defeat Donald Trump -- just gave a quarter of a million dollars to Cindy Hyde-Smith’s Super PAC. | | | | [ ](https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bikujtl-ydllhlurty-r/)

Peter,
Cindy Hyde-Smith is being bankrolled by a major Hillary Clinton donor.
Sean Parker -- a California billionaire who hosted a fundraiser for Clinton at his own home and raised over $1 million to try and defeat Donald Trump -- just gave a quarter of a million dollars to Cindy Hyde-Smith’s Super PAC.
On top of that, he’s funded efforts to limit your 2nd Amendment rights and donated to pro-amnesty groups.
[If you can please chip in and help support our campaign to fight back against these California liberals, I would greatly appreciate it.](https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bikujtl-ydllhlurty-y/)
\- Chris
* * *
**On The Trail**
**NESHOBA COUNTY**
Chris and a team of volunteer leaders spent a day on the Neshoba County Fairgrounds going door to door meeting with cabin owners and making plans for the upcoming fair.
Chris will be speaking at the Neshoba County Fair on Thursday, August 2nd at 9:50am. You can join him there, and don’t forget to bring your homemade signs and poster boards showing your support for Chris! It is sure to be a historic day!
\------------
**BRUCE**
Thanks to all of our supporters who braved the heat and came out to the Sawmill Festival with us. It was fantastic!
* * *
**ICYMI**
**_Chris McDaniel interview on The Wilkow Majority_**
Chris sat down with Andrew Wilkow and talked about how he is fighting against both liberal Democrats and establishment Republicans in Washington.
[You can listen to the full interview by clicking here.](https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bikujtl-ydllhlurty-j/)

**Contract with Mississippi**
Chris’ **Contract with Mississippi** , is a 14-point plan of priorities that Chris will focus on when he is elected and so the people of Mississippi can hold him accountable.
[If you haven’t read the Contract with Mississippi yet, you can do so by clicking here.](https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bikujtl-ydllhlurty-i/)
* * *
**Support Our Campaign**
Our majority in the Senate is razor-thin, and Democrats are desperate to take control. We need strong conservatives to stand with President Trump and help enact his America First agenda, as well as vote to confirm Judge Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court. Chris is that conservative, but he can’t do it without your support.

name: Wendy H. [Press Secretary]
subject: How we beat fake news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

Getting the truth out and setting the record straight is as important as ever.

Dark money ads. Social media hoaxes. It can be hard for the truth to get out in 2018.

It's a lot -- and with the chaos in Washington it's never been more important for our grassroots team here in Minnesota to be as strong as possible.

**Will you join the team and pledge to volunteer?**

[**You can march in a parade, write a letter to the editor, share Amy 's news online, or even take a lawn sign for your yard -- just click here to sign up!**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=wJBnuKJVFD3cw4xD5SIUTXB1jRokub2C)

By signing up you'll be part of a team with members in all 87 Minnesota counties. You'll be part of a team that's made over 40,000 grassroots contributions, marched in parades in every part of our state, and stood up to the special interests by demanding we tackle climate change, save net neutrality, and protect people with pre-existing conditions from being denied health care.

The special interests know that Team Klobuchar is tough -- but now it's time to show them just how strong -- and how big -- we really are.

As the summer heats up, can we count on you to [**join thousands of other volunteers across Minnesota and help Amy at this critical time?**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=RruIbxfEE4lJHJaRA%2BrqenB1jRokub2C)

Thanks,

Wendy H.
Press Secretary

My campaign is committed to fighting for clean air and clean water, supporting the growth of renewable energy, and urging the United States to rejoin international agreements to reduce global warming, including the Paris Agreement. Texas has a strong movement to protect our environment and ensure that future generations can enjoy our natural heritage. subject: helping people across our state and country

body:
|
---

| | | This email has a lot of information about what I've been working on, but I hope you will take a moment to read it.

**_[I need your support for my re-election campaign, and I want to make sure you understand why and how I'm working to earn it.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-sunday-deadline-alert?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+I+need+your+support+for+my+reelection+ca&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180722_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180722_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180722_1_1")_**

* * *

Nearly every day, we face news about President Trump's scandals, his lies, and the political catastrophes created by his administration. But that shouldn't detract from the progress that is being made despite his chaos.

In May, the Senate passed a resolution to save net neutrality. I can't overstate how big a victory this is for Democrats. Many said our bill wouldn't go anywhere, but it did. We showed the Senate can still come together and address the issues that matter to millions of Americans, consumers, and small businesses.

We are also making progress on my bill to protect Native American items and artifacts. The Safeguard Tribal Objects of Patrimony (STOP) Act passed unanimously out of its first Senate committee. I introduced this bill after meeting with local students who are pushing for greater protections for tribal artifacts, and I'm proud we've cleared the first hurdle to passing this bill.

And while the Trump administration makes moves to shrink our public lands, I am looking to protect them. I introduced legislation to shield the Chaco Canyon area - a sacred places to all New Mexicans - from drilling. Protecting Chaco from further development will ensure we don't lose its priceless history.

Some of these updates don't warrant a breaking news alert on your phone, but they are making a difference in people's lives. I came to the Senate to represent New Mexicans and our values, and we are making progress that will help people across our state and country.

**_[That is why I am asking for your support today. I am in my first Senate re-election race this year, and all this hard work and more will be undone if one of my extreme right-wing opponents defeats me this November. To make sure that doesn't happen, we need to reach our weekend fundraising goal by bringing in $5,000 in grassroots donations. Will you pitch in and help me reach this goal before the midnight deadline?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-sunday-deadline-alert?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+That+is+why+I+am+asking+for+your+support&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180722_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180722_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180722_1_1")_**

name: TimKaine.com - Debate roundup
subject: In Case You Missed It: Corey Stewart said →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Roe v. Wade must be overturned, Trump is doing a good job addressing Russia's election meddling, and a defense of Roy Moore and his decision to skip his job as a public servant to campaign for him. --
| | Derek, did you tune into the debate yesterday?

A couple _highlights:_
* When asked about the recent news around the Supreme Court, Corey made it clear where he stands on reproductive rights, saying that **Roe v. Wade was wrongly decided and needs to be overturned.**

* The audience, _understandably_ , had to laugh in disbelief when Corey insisted that Trump is doing a good job of standing up to Russia on election meddling.

* Corey completely avoided answering a question straight from Tim about skipping a Prince William County board meeting to campaign for Roy Moore - even after allegations of predatory and abusive behavior. **When finally pressed on Moore by the moderator, Corey *defended* him.**

Tim went in prepared, working with our team tirelessly to get his policies and positions right, down to the details.

No gimmicks, no dramatic flare, just representing and serving Virginians.

But yesterday was just a preview. The attacks from Stewart will not only hurt Tim, they will hurt Democratic House candidates across Virginia. We need to be able to fight back from now until Election Day in order to win the Senate seat, the 11 House seats, _and the state house next year._

**If seeing the candidates head-to-head puts things in perspective for you too, now is a great time to help us invest in the tools we need to have a decisive victory on[November 6th:](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1235/3e0906/6949a1c9/3e35cac2/1250213713/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180722_1_FR_TEAM_Post-Debate-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+November+6th&utm_campaign=20180722_1_FR_TEAM_Post-Debate-LDND&source=20180722_1_FR_TEAM_Post-Debate-LDND")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1235/3e0906/6949a1c9/3e35cac1/1250213713/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180722_1_FR_TEAM_Post-Debate-LDND_5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180722_1_FR_TEAM_Post-Debate-LDND&source=20180722_1_FR_TEAM_Post-Debate-LDND")

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Why Tuesday is critical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
With your help, we'll be ready for whatever Trump's allies throw our way. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa933/34a064cc/b98bf59/70f4195/3220023599/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Dear friends, I know my team has been emailing you quite a bit over the last few days, but I want to quickly reiterate why Tuesday is critical for us: **In two days, Georgia Republicans will choose their nominee for governor.** That means that in two days, the Republican Party will be all-in here in Georgia, pouring millions of dollars into their nominee's campaign and doing everything they can to stop our momentum. But we are powered by the grassroots. By people. This is your campaign. So we need you now. We need to be in a strong position to take them to task and continue fighting for Georgia - for Medicaid expansion and health care access, for excellent public schools, and an economy that works for every family. **[Will you chip in $3 or more to keep Team Abrams on the path to victory?](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa933/34a064cc/b98bf59/70f4192/3220023599/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNzIyMTgtMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-gop-runoff?refcode=IE072218-1-full")** Friends, if we are committed to this fight, to Georgia, to each other, to the issues, we can win. It's time to show Trump and his allies that the movement we've built won't be crushed by tweets or negative attacks. **[Please, stand with us: Make a contribution before Tuesday's runoff election. We will need more support than ever to defend our shared values and spread our positive vision.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa933/34a064cc/b98bf59/70f4192/3220023599/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNzIyMTgtMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-gop-runoff?refcode=IE072218-1-full")** As always, thank you for your support. The race to choose Georgia's next governor will look very different in two days, but I am ready to fight by your side in the months ahead. With sincerest gratitude, \- Stacey Abrams

Friend -- I just want to make sure you saw Richard's email from a few days ago. We are almost 3 weeks out from the Primary election and would appreciate any support you can give the campaign. Your past support has made a difference and we're grateful. With your help we will continue to get Richard's message to the voters and WIN on November 14. Thank you, Ellen Stankiewicz, Finance Director Friend -- Thank you for your all your support to our campaign for the U.S. Senate. It’s greatly appreciated and be assured that you have made a difference. The only way to combat special interest influence is to have the support of generous individuals like you, who care deeply about restoring democracy. Your generosity has fueled my effort to end government for sale and combat the damage being inflicted on our nation by President Trump and his allies in Congress and those who refuse to confront him. Since I entered the race, I have been humbled by the outpouring of support my candidacy has received. My mission is to make all Minnesotans feel that they have an equal voice and eliminate corruption eroding our system. Rest assured that I am doing everything I can to clean up politics as usual and bring needed change to our state and nation.
